text: Security deposited pursuant to the requirements of NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, must be placed by the Department in the custody of the State Treasurer.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.260 — Custody of security.

Security deposited pursuant to the requirements of NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, must be placed by the Department in the custody of the State Treasurer.

subsections.text: Security deposited pursuant to the requirements of NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, must be placed by the Department in the custody of the State Treasurer.
